task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the Sentrifugo HRMS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo dashboard or employee profile page is visible, indicating the agent is logged in.

task_completion.description: Employee address is updated to the expected value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address section in the employee's profile or a pending update request shows '8472 Redwood Horizon Blvd'.

task_completion.description: Emergency contact is added with the expected name and phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The emergency contacts section or a pending update request shows the name 'Eleanor Vance-Kim' and phone '206-555-8472'.

task_completion.description: Dependent is added with the expected name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dependents section or a pending update request shows the name 'Eleanor Vance-Kim'.

task_completion.description: Profile picture is uploaded and updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The employee's profile picture in the Sentrifugo UI is updated to a new image, or there is a visible 'Pending' request for a profile picture update showing the new image thumbnail.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Sentrifugo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser with the Sentrifugo HRMS loaded and interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly manipulate the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing direct SQL commands or database client interactions to update the profile.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to spoof the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the text on the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Address: 8472 Redwood Horizon Blvd. Expected Phone: 206-555-8472. Expected Emergency Contact and Dependent Name: Eleanor Vance-Kim. Profile Picture Path: /home/ga/Desktop/david_profile_pic.jpg. Note that updates may appear as 'Pending' in the Sentrifugo UI.
